title: My BFF Got Engaged!!!
excerpt: My BFF Courtney got engaged to her sweet man, Jon on October 4th. He had been planning it for quite some time and told us he was going to pop the question during a picnic at the spot where they…
body:
My BFF Courtney got engaged to her sweet man, Jon on October 4th. He had been planning it for quite some time and told us he was going to pop the question during a picnic at the spot where they first met. Then he would suggest going to their friend's place to show off the ring and share the news. There, waiting for them would be friends gathered for a surprise engagement party. Since we missed out on the fun, we put together a little video they watched at the party along with videos from other folks who couldn't make it.

We are all SO happy for them!
